Templates › Job Safety Analysis (JSA)

🔎 Job Safety Analysis (JSA)

Step-by-step task hazard analysis for NZ tradies — identify risks and control measures for each step of a specific job.

How to use: Complete a JSA for each task before work begins. Workers must read and sign. All fields are editable — click any text to change it.

Click to upload logo
JOB SAFETY ANALYSIS (JSA)
JSA #: JSA-001
Date: 2026-01-01
Task: Describe the specific task

Complete a JSA for each specific task before work begins. All workers performing the task must read and sign. Review if task conditions change.

Site / Project
Site address
Principal Contractor: [Name]
Prepared by
Name / Role
Review date: [date]
PPE Required for This Task
List all PPE required for this specific task...
Task Steps, Hazards & Controls
#Task StepHazard / RiskRisk LevelControl MeasureResidual Risk
1Set up work areaSlip/trip hazardsMClear area, barricade if neededL
2
3
4
5
6
Risk Level: H = High (stop work if uncontrolled) | M = Medium | L = Low
Emergency Procedures
Emergency contact: [Name / Phone]. First aid location: [Location]. If serious incident: call 111, do not disturb scene, notify WorkSafe 0800 030 040.
Worker Sign-Off — I have read and understood this JSA
NameRoleSignatureDate
Health & Safety at Work Act 2015. Review JSA if conditions change. NZ Tradie Tools — tradietools.nz

🔎 Job Safety Analysis (JSA)

No sign-up required. Free forever.

How to use this template

  • Click any field to edit it
  • Fill in your business details first
  • Click "Download PDF" to save
  • Or click "Print" for a paper copy

Complete a JSA for each task before work begins. Workers must read and sign.
